ShipLog now shows a container's installed version instead of just "latest", works with Folder View 3, and adds a few settings conveniences.

## Added
- **Installed version, shown immediately.** ShipLog reads the version an image declares about itself (the `org.opencontainers.image.version` label, falling back to `org.opencontainers.image.revision`) and shows it on the first sweep — so a rolling `:latest` container displays its real version (e.g. `3.0.1`) without waiting for ShipLog to witness an update. The digest-proven version memory still takes precedence.
- **Folder View 3 support.** The Docker-tab changelog chip now finds containers that the Folder View plugin groups into folders (folder-header rows are skipped, expanded members are tagged, re-tagged when a folder is opened). The plain Docker tab is unchanged.
- **GitHub token Check button** in Settings — validates the token and shows your effective hourly rate limit. Anonymous GitHub allows only ~60 requests/hour, which is the usual reason changelogs come back empty; a token raises it to ~5000/hour.
- **Ollama Autodetect button** — probes the common local Ollama endpoints (127.0.0.1, the host IP, the docker0 gateway) on port 11434 and fills in the URL and first model.

## Changed
- **Engine status, same-origin.** The Settings "status page" link used the GUI hostname, which fails when Unraid is opened over its `*.myunraid.net` address. It is replaced by a same-origin engine-status line ("engine running · N containers tracked" / "not reachable"); the optional "open" link now uses the real LAN IP.
- The **Enable toggle is green** when on, and the **Apply button** is a clearer green primary.

## Fixed
- **Changelog resolution is more transparent.** When the GitHub API rate limit is hit, ShipLog now logs the cause and the remedy once (set a `GITHUB_TOKEN`) instead of silently showing an empty changelog, and it skips a redundant API call for repos with no releases to stretch the anonymous budget.

## Install / update
Update from the Plugins tab, or install by URL:
`https://raw.githubusercontent.com/junkerderprovinz/shiplog/main/plugin/shiplog.plg`
